$PENGU: Many altcoins can easily double or go much higher under the right conditions. I have a bag of PENGU and it's 1 of the better alts today and I think that memes in general are a sector you should focus on. https://t.co/R3G6aGUll1

@ThinkingBitmex yeah that's the risk for a lot of ppl: early but chances this is just a fakeout and we go lower or later w. more confirmation but not as much upside. I just know that every rally has been fcked lately

If you're sidelined or in cash, don't worry. Every rally the last several months has gotten beaten down and there hasn't been much of a sustained trend for the bulls in a long time. If this is the start of a move, you'll have plenty of time to hop on the train.

If this is a true reversal, I think you probably go with memes. Memes led the way on Jan 1st and also the last true market wide reversal back in March/April 2025. 

Other trade ideas would be more institutional coins related to stablecoins. UNI, AAVE (maybe not rn), XPL, ETH.
